name: skills-budget
description: Warns when installed skill descriptions exceed context budget (default 1% of context window)

commands.name: save-profile
commands.description: Save current enabled skills as a named profile. Usage: /skills-budget save-profile <name>

commands.name: update-profile
commands.description: Overwrite the active profile with current enabled skills.

commands.name: switch-profile
commands.description: Switch to a named skill profile. Usage: /skills-budget switch-profile <name>

commands.name: list-profiles
commands.description: List all skill profiles, highlighting the active one.

commands.name: delete-profile
commands.description: Delete a named skill profile. Usage: /skills-budget delete-profile <name>
